productDisplayName: Nike Women Be Bold Grey Capri
description: CompositionGrey capris made of 90% nylon and 10% spandex, with Dri-Fit technology, a broad elasticated waist with an orange band running along the back and embroidered nike swoosh near the left waistFittingSlimWash careMachine wash cold with like coloursDo not use softenersRemove immediately/do not allow to lay on itself when wetDo not bleachLine dryDo not iron or dry cleanStylish to the T, these nylon capris from nike are designed with Dri-Fit technology to keep you fresh and comfortable while you sweat it out at the gym or on the trail. The broad waistband sits snugly, offering a comfort fit. Team it with Nike Sports tees and shoes for that smart, sporty look.
